allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add preset mode with 6 customizable transpose slots

- Add PRESET_MODE as 4th display mode with 6 preset slots
- Each slot stores a transpose value (-12 to +12) adjustable via up/down buttons
- Add on-screen left/right navigation buttons for cursor movement
- Implement triangle icons (▲/▼) for up/down buttons
- Unify button heights (45px) for consistent layout
- Add pedal support for left/right slot navigation in preset mode
- Initialize all preset slots to 0
- Maintain AllNotesOff on button A across all modes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
